text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're a lifesaver, Ines! It's hard to find a training
buddy this early in the morning!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, today's your birthday, so I want to do
everything I can to make it a good one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Would you mind hearing me out real quick?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...I want you to race me—both of us leaving it all
on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, was that asking for a bit too much?
Actually, forget it—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No no, I'd be happy to! Just know that I won't go
easy on you just because it's your birthday!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Awesome! I wouldn't have it any other way!
